title: National Environment Youth Parliament 2026
summary: SFD successfully hosted the University-Level NEYP 2026 at Tripura University on “AI for Climate Resilience,” selecting 10 participants for the regional competition.
description: STUDENTS FOR DEVELOPMENT (SFD) SUCCESSFULLY ORGANIZED THE UNIVERSITY-LEVEL PROGRAM OF THE 4TH NATIONAL ENVIRONMENT YOUTH PARLIAMENT (NEYP) 2026 AT TRIPURA UNIVERSITY ON THE THEME “AI FOR CLIMATE RESILIENCE.” THE EVENT INSPIRED STUDENTS TO EXPLORE INNOVATIVE AND SUSTAINABLE ENVIRONMENTAL SOLUTIONS. TEN OUTSTANDING PARTICIPANTS WERE SELECTED TO REPRESENT TRIPURA UNIVERSITY AT THE REGIONAL-LEVEL COMPETITION OF NEYP 2026..
